title: AI AMAZE Data Source and Visualization Template - English
updated_focus: Separate English preview based on 2026-05-22-ai-amaze-observability; does not overwrite the Chinese version.
note: English explanation version. The previous Excel file is excluded from this version.
data_source_section: spreadsheet-style event form/table, one row per event; adds retail minute-level click tracking, game/machine extension events, AI language judgment, backend test resources, and click-to-conversation linkage
